title: Devin + Jira Integration Lab
description: End-to-end lab demonstrating how Devin integrates with Jira for automated ticket triage, code generation from tickets, and PR creation. Includes both Cognition-hosted and customer-hosted environment guides.

cognitionEnv.title: Jira Integration Demo Repo
cognitionEnv.description: Pre-configured repo with Jira webhook handlers and Devin triggers

customerEnv.title: Customer Setup Repo (Fork Template)
customerEnv.description: Template repo customers fork to set up their own environment

setupGuide.title: Jira Integration Setup Guide
setupGuide.description: Step-by-step guide for configuring Jira + Devin in customer environment

media.title: Architecture Explanation
media.description: Deep dive into the webhook architecture and Devin session orchestration
